2603.16959.title: Machine intelligence supports the full chain of 2D dendrite synthesis
2603.16959.paper_summary: Exemplified by the chemical vapor deposition growth of two-dimensional dendrites, which has potential applications in catalysis and presents a parameter-intensive, data-scarce and reaction process-complex model problem, we devise a machine intelligence-empowered framework for the full chain support of material synthesis, encompassing rapid process optimization, accurate customized synthesis, and comprehensive mechanism deciphering.First, active learning is integrated into the experimental workflow, identifying an optimal recipe for the growth of highly-branched, electrocatalytically-active ReSe2 dendrites through 60 experiments (4 iterations), which account for less than 1.3% of the numerous possible parameter combinations.Then, a prediction accuracy-guided data augmentation strategy is developed combined with a tree-based machine learning (ML) algorithm, unveiling a non-linear correlation between 5 process variables and fractal dimension (DF) of ReSe2 dendrites with only 9 experiment additions, which guides the synthesis of various user-defined DF. Finally, we construct a data-knowledge dual-driven mechanism model by integration of cross-scale characterizations, interpretable ML models, and domain knowledge in thermodynamics and kinetics, unraveling synergistic contributions of multiple process parameters to the product morphology. This work demonstrates the ML potential to transform the research paradigm and is adaptable to broader material synthesis.
2603.16959.paper_summary_zh: 以化學氣相沉積生長二維樹狀晶體為例，這具有催化潛在應用，並呈現出一個參數密集、數據稀缺且反應過程複雜的模型問題，我們設計了一個機器智能賦能的框架，以全面支持材料合成，包括快速過程優化、準確的定制合成以及全面的機制解碼。<lb/>首先，將主動學習整合進實驗工作流程，通過60次實驗（4次迭代）確定出一個最佳配方，用於生長高度分支的電催化活性ReSe2樹狀晶體，這些實驗僅占眾多可能參數組合的1.3%以下。<lb/>然後，開發了一種以預測準確性為指導的數據增強策略，結合基於樹的機器學習（ML）算法，揭示了5個過程變量與ReSe2樹狀晶體的分形維度（DF）之間的非線性關聯，僅需增加9次實驗，這為合成各種用戶定義的DF提供了指導。<lb/>最後，我們通過整合跨尺度表徵、可解釋的ML模型以及熱力學和動力學的領域知識，構建了一個數據-知識雙驅動的機制模型，揭示了多個過程參數對產品形態的協同貢獻。<lb/>這項工作展示了ML在轉變研究範式方面的潛力，並且可適應於更廣泛的材料合成。
2603.16959.author: Wenqiang Huang et.al.
2603.16959.authors: Wenqiang Huang, Susu Fang, Xuhang Gu, Shen'ao Xue, Huanhuan Xing, Junjie Jiang, Junying Zhang, Shen Zhou, Zheng Luo, Jin Zhang, Fangping Ouyang, Shanshan Wang
